name: gpd-state
description: GPD project state management. Tools for querying state, phase info, progress, validation, health checks, and configuration.
prerequisites: Install GPD before enabling built-in MCP servers.

health_check.expect: returns a stable validation error envelope for missing required project_dir

python_module.notes: Replace `${GPD_PYTHON}` with a Python >=3.11 interpreter that has GPD installed.
